title: rhinanthus alectorolophus
intro: Rhinanthus alectorolophus, also known as Yellow Rattle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae), which is a group of parasitic plants that obtain their nutrients by tapping into the roots of other plants. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Rhinanthus alectorolophus include its potential to treat kidney problems and to reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote urinary health and to support the kidneys.
